title: Rules of Play
creator: Katie Salen Tekinbaş and Eric Zimmerman
description: A large textbook and reference work that develops a vocabulary for rules, play, culture, systems, interaction, and meaningful play.
useful: Best used as a reference or structured course text rather than a quick practical manual.
audience: Students, teachers, and designers who need a broad reference vocabulary for games and play.
learning: Analyze games as rules, play, systems, and culture
Distinguish formal structures from player experience
Use meaningful play as one design lens
